name: Attendance
description: Meeting and practice attendance for clubs and troops — take the roll in seconds, see who's been showing up, and spot members who are drifting away.

source.query: SELECT id AS id, title AS title, CASE WHEN start_time <> '' THEN (event_date || 'T' || start_time) ELSE event_date END AS when_at, NULLIF(location, '') AS subtitle FROM app_attendance__events WHERE event_date = :today ORDER BY start_time LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM app_attendance__events WHERE event_date >= :today AND event_date <= date(:today, '+6 days') LIMIT 1
